violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Soapy water currently in 2nd basin of 3 compartment sink. Operate as follows... 1) Hot soapy water 2) Clear water rinse 3) Sanitizing rinse 4) Air dry all utensils

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Multiple holes in ceiling in basement level storage area.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Store wet mops out of utility sinks. Elevate to facilitate proper drying.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
